name: Red Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Dried Kidney Beans, soaked overnight
2 cups Vegetable Broth (1 cube in 2 cups hot H2O)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 2 cups of water to a boil.
2. Add pepper, celery, onion, parsley, garlic, and hot pepper sauce. Stir in vegetable broth. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the remaining 4 cups of water. Bring to a boil again.
4. Add drained beans and bring to a boil once more. Cover and reduce heat.
5. Simmer for 2 1/2 hours or until beans have made a thick, bubbly, brick-colored broth. Add salt.
6. Serve over brown rice.
